vibe: Premium, distinctive, trustworthy, modern Indian E-commerce. Combines high craft (Godly-inspired) with functional B2B/B2C conversion (SaaSFrame-inspired configurator UIs).

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-12 for standard sections, p-20 to p-32 for marketing sections.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Use Mode A 'Tetris' grid for homepage categories and marketing sections (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8).
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Use Mode B 'Control Room' grid for configurator and admin dashboard (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6).
spacing_and_layout.hero_overlay: Gradient overlay from-black/60 via-black/30 to-transparent for text contrast on hero images. Max solid opacity bg-black/40.

surfaces_and_components.header: Crystal Glass variant: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70, border-b border-black/5, shadow-sm. Must have logo, 3-5 links visible on desktop, and primary CTA.
surfaces_and_components.cards_products: Neumorphism 'Tactile' variant with sharp edges: flat white background, subtle border-black/5, hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300.
surfaces_and_components.buttons: Primary: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white hover:bg-[#D63328] rounded-sm. Secondary: bg-white border border-[#0A0A0A] text-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#0A0A0A] hover:text-white rounded-sm.
surfaces_and_components.configurator_ui: Split layout. 2D/3D visualizer on left (col-span-1 md:col-span-8), sticky scrolling attribute selector on right (col-span-1 md:col-span-4). Use customized Shadcn forms/tabs.
surfaces_and_components.marquee: Use 'Editorial Ribbon' style for corporate clients logo strip. Low contrast pale background, large gaps (gap-24), very slow smooth drift.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: All interactive elements must change state. Buttons must elevate and change color.
motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Framer Motion staggered fade-ups for product grids (initial opacity-0 translate-y-4).
motion_and_interaction.ai_interactions: When 'Generate with AI' is clicked, use 'The Tracing Beam' border effect around the canvas to signal AI generation.

iconography.style: Duotone or Regular weight, clean and premium.

testing.rules: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, variants) MUST include data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based).

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the JSON configuration for colors and typography.
Implement the UI using React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI.
Ensure the homepage has 3 clear CTAs in the hero section: 'Design My Product', 'Create With AI', 'Request Corporate Quote'.
Build the product configurator with a split-screen layout (preview left, options right) and integrate AI Design Studio features as a distinct mode.
Use Phosphor icons for all UI iconography.
Integrate Framer Motion for smooth page reveals and hover effects.
All forms (checkout, corporate RFQ) must use highly customized Shadcn inputs.
Never use placeholder URLs for images; only use the media_urls provided.
Ensure 'data-testid' is on all CTAs, form inputs, and variant selectors for testing.
